summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 13/12/2022
DCE iron ore futures declined by 0.19% today, the main contract closed 808.5. The traders' willingness toship is general. The steel mills are less active to purchase.The overall trading sentiment of the market is worse.
